typedefs.name: SurfaceId
typedefs.description: Unique identifier for a client surface/window.

typedefs.name: Color
typedefs.description: OKLCH + alpha packed as [L, C, H_degrees, A].

common.name: Ping
common.description: Ping for RTT measurement and keep-alive.

common.name: Pong
common.description: Ping response echoing nonce for RTT measurement.

c2s.name: ClientHello
c2s.description: Initial client metadata and advertised capabilities.

c2s.name: BindingAssigned
c2s.description: Client acknowledgement that a server binding has been mapped locally.

c2s.name: InputValue
c2s.description: Current input value for a declared binding identifier.

c2s.name: SurfaceList
c2s.description: List of currently available client surfaces (id, width, height).

c2s.name: SurfaceResized
c2s.description: Notification that a client surface changed size.

s2c.name: SetGameName
s2c.description: Display name of the game/session for client UI.

s2c.name: Join
s2c.description: Signal that the client has enough session state to initialize local surfaces and begin rendering.

s2c.name: SurfaceLockDimensions
s2c.description: Lock a surface to a specific width and height.

s2c.name: SurfaceLockAspectRatio
s2c.description: Lock a surface to a specific aspect ratio (numerator/denominator).

s2c.name: SurfaceClearBackground
s2c.description: Set a surface clear background color in OKLCH (L, C, H_degrees, alpha).

s2c.name: BindingDeclare
s2c.description: Server-declared input binding definition that the client must map.

s2c.name: ElementMove
s2c.description: Authoritative transform update for a uniquely identified element.

s2c.name: ElementRemove
s2c.description: Notification that a uniquely identified element should be removed.

s2c.name: ElementSetTransformPrediction
s2c.description: Enable/disable transform prediction and configure affected components and mode.

s2c.name: ElementSetColor
s2c.description: Set draw color for one element on this client.
